title: Quiz: Qubit Mapping
description: Test your understanding of qubit mapping strategies

questions.question: Initial qubit mapping affects:

options.text: Number of SWAPs needed during routing

questions.explanation: Better initial mapping means fewer SWAPs needed.

questions.question: Interaction-aware mapping places:

options.text: Frequently interacting logical qubits near each other

questions.explanation: Placing frequent interactions adjacently reduces SWAPs.

questions.question: Trivial mapping (qubit i to physical i) is always optimal.
questions.explanation: Trivial mapping ignores circuit structure and is usually suboptimal.

questions.question: Satisfied ratio measures:

options.text: Fraction of gates executable without SWAP

questions.explanation: It shows how many interactions are already adjacent.
